name: Urban Parachute Recovery System Configuration
description: You are a Drone Safety Officer preparing a heavy-lift hexacopter for an urban orthophoto survey over a populated city center. To comply with aviation regulations (ASTM F3322), configure the automated Parachute Recovery System (PRS) parameters in QGroundControl according to the specifications in /home/ga/Documents/QGC/prs_integration_manual.txt. Document the setup in a compliance sign-off report at /home/ga/Documents/QGC/prs_signoff.txt. The report must state that the PRS is enabled, list the configured minimum deployment altitude, the critical sink rate, the assigned manual trigger channel, and include a clear 'Airworthy' statement.
